task.title: Create Rust notification router service skeleton
task.description: Initialize Rust project with Axum framework, basic routing, and project structure

implementation.details: Setup Cargo.toml with Axum 0.7, tokio, sqlx dependencies. Create basic project structure with main.rs, routes, handlers, and models modules.

decision.description: Database ORM choice for Rust service

task.acceptance_criteria: Service compiles successfully, basic health endpoint responds, Docker image builds
